output.not_legal_advice: Not legal or actuarial advice. Rate filings require certification by a qualified actuary and approval by the applicable state insurance department.
output.pii_note: ZERO PII: aggregate rate components only. No policyholder, premium, or personal data enters this kernel.
output.proprietary_data_notice: USER-SUPPLIED LOSS COSTS ONLY. This kernel performs LCM decomposition arithmetic exclusively. It does not embed, store, or redistribute ISO/Verisk advisory loss costs or any proprietary rate-bureau filing. Ensure your pure_loss_cost input is approved and non-proprietary.
output.regulatory_basis: ASOP 25 (Premium Calculations); state rate filing regulations (SERFF). LCM formula: rate = loss_cost × LCM; LCM = 1 / (1 - LAE% - fixed_exp% - variable_exp% - profit%). Rate adequacy review required by qualified actuary.
output.table_source: Actuarial Standard of Practice No. 25 (Premium Calculations); Willis Towers Watson Rate Adequacy methodology; user-supplied loss costs only — no ISO/Verisk advisory rates embedded.
